---
title: "noisy-channel-binom-pref-analysis"
author: "Zachary Houghton"
date: "2025-01-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(brms)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
pilot_data = read.csv('../Data/pilot_results.csv', quote = "\"")

data_analysis = pilot_data %>%
  select('participant', 'List', 'Condition', 'WordA', 'WordB', 'Binomial', 'PrimeType', 'Prime', 'Sentence', 'SentenceType', 'Questions', 'Answer', 'key_resp.corr', 'key_resp_4.keys', 'conditionFile', 'trials.thisN', starts_with("Word")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(List)) %>%
  mutate(correct = ifelse(`key_resp_4.keys` == Answer, 1, 0)) %>%
  group_by(participant) %>%
  mutate('OverallAcc' = mean(correct))

data_analysis = data_analysis %>%
  mutate(sentence_split = str_split(Sentence, " "))

data_analysis = data_analysis %>%
  rowwise() %>%  # Ensures per-row operation
  mutate(word_index = case_when(
    SentenceType == 'Sentence (alphabetical)' ~ which(sentence_split == WordA)[1],  # Use [1] to ensure a single value
    TRUE ~ NA_real_,  # Default value for rows not matching the condition
    SentenceType == 'Sentence (nonalphabetical)' ~ which(sentence_split == WordB)[1],  # Use [1] to ensure a single value
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>%
  ungroup()  # Remove rowwise grouping




data_analysis = data_analysis %>%
  mutate(word_index = word_index - 1)

data_analysis = data_analysis %>%
  filter(!is.na(word_index)) %>%
  mutate(target_cols = map(word_index, ~paste0("Word", .x:(.x + 2))))

data_analysis = data_analysis %>%
  mutate(reading_time = mapply(function(cols, row) sum(row[cols]),
                               target_cols,
                               split(data_analysis, seq(nrow(data_analysis)))))


```
